title: Back To Dirt Plugin
description: With Back to Dirt Plugin you can turn a dirt path into dirt.
body:
# **Back To Dirt Plugin.**
- **Back To Dirt** is a bukkit plugin that allows you to transform a path into a dirt again.
- I developed this plugin after rebuilding my hardcore world village, so I suffered a lot breaking these blocks.
- Feel free to use this plugin wherever you want!

## **How to use?**

- **Just hold shift and right click on a dirt path and it will turn into dirt.**

## Turning dirt paths into dirt.
![Turning dirt paths into dirt.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f171d0f79dcac2cded5fdf9a20c3a30b801819b1.gif)

**Shaders: [Solas Shader](https://www.modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader)**

Not much to say, i hope you like this plugin.

**Well, if you want to leave me a tip, https://ko-fi.com/mateusmg2010**

**Thanks for downloading :)**
